subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest these radiant faces illumined with the light of guidance, and these eyes gazing toward Thy Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری هذه الوجوه الناضره بنور الهدی و هذه الاعین الناظره الی ملکوتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for prosperity
